# theStacc — Local SEO & AI Content Automation

> AI SEO automation that writes, ranks, and publishes content across Google, AI search, Maps, and every major social channel — automatically.

- [Home](https://thestacc.com/)

- [Contact](https://thestacc.com/contact/)
- [Demo](https://thestacc.com/demo/)
- [Checkout](https://thestacc.com/checkout/)

## Product modules

- [Content SEO / Blog SEO](https://thestacc.com/modules/content-seo/)
- [Local SEO](https://thestacc.com/modules/local-seo/)
- [Social Media](https://thestacc.com/modules/social-media/)

- [Rank Tracking](https://thestacc.com/features/rank-tracking/)
